/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=native -O3 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -flto=auto -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/multichat.dir/link.d  -o multichat.so CMakeFiles/multichat.dir/multichat_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6WebSockets.so.6.11.1 -lobs /usr/lib/libobs-frontend-api.so -lsecret-1 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
